review_title: Great Marketing Data Intelligence Platform for Digital Businesses
author: Gandhrav Kumar S.
pros: Data stitching, Attribution, and Reporting. It provides highly reliable full-funnel stitched data, which is essential to scaling any digital business.
cons: None in particular. More integrations for new-age platforms can be added.

author: Rishabh K.
pros: Perfect stitching of data to give us a clearer insight on performance
cons: Would like to go deeper integration with Product analytics tools

review_title: Easyinsights live saver tool for me
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Data integration simplicity, realtime data, fantastic support, and software reliability
cons: Due to API difficulties, sometime its impossible to receive metrics that you get in the original channel you got the data from.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Abhilash Kumar B.
pros: It displays all of your data in one location, allowing you to develop meaningful insights. I'm freeing myself from the daily data export tasks and using the time to develop my strategy.
cons: Graphs and visuals are the only limitation for me

review_title: Awesome tool for any business to keep track of ads performance
author: Hitarth S.
pros: I found google sheet automations to be very useful, you can easily customize data sources, merge data points and automate that on your email
cons: Out of 100 days, 1 day data does not populate but Easyinsight team is very proactive in fixing any issues encountered.

review_title: Very simple, easy to use, Campign data tracking
description: It was very helpful, earlier we tried to involve our Tech team to write big Google script codes, integrate with Facebook APIs and ton other things. EasyInsights made it all very simple. Amazing product
author: Pranu P.
pros: - can be connected to Google ads, Facebook ads & other platforms very easily - Gets all the data to google sheets, which makes it easy to analyse - Simple UI - Customisable reports
cons: Initially while using the tool for the very first time, faced minor glitches, but the team proactively reached out to solve.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: The overall experience is great . It really helped us to achieve the marketing KPI
author: Nitish K.
pros: Ease of integrating all the marketing channel on an excel
cons: It will be great if we integrate UAC campaign

review_title: One of the best product for performance marketing dashboards
author: Kethan S.
pros: Ease of deployment and use. Customisable dashboards
cons: Difficult to manipulate data on the dashboard

author: Simran D.
pros: Great tool with amazing integration capabilities.
cons: Nothing notable to dislike about this tool.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Rohit K.
pros: The fact that I spend no time collecting/pulling in the data and can customise the way I visualise and aggregate it in any way I need.
cons: Seems complicated on very first use, but excellent support system makes it smoother
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: EI is a game changing product in the market. It can be used by anyone on Ms Excel. That's awesome!
author: Prateek V.
pros: Easy to use. All you need is Ms Excel.
cons: Some extra features associated with the customisation point of view can be considered.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
